org.apache.dubbo.common.logger

接口 LoggerAdapter

  • 所有已知子接口:
    LoggerAdapter
    所有已知实现类:
    JclLoggerAdapter, JdkLoggerAdapter, Log4j2LoggerAdapter, Log4jLoggerAdapter, Slf4jLoggerAdapter

    @SPI
public interface LoggerAdapter
    Logger provider

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      File getFile()
      Get the current logging file
      Level getLevel()
      Get the current logging level
      Logger getLogger(Class<?> key)
      Get a logger
      Logger getLogger(String key)
      Get a logger
      void setFile(File file)
      Set the current logging file
      void setLevel(Level level)
      Set the current logging level

    • 方法详细资料

      • getLogger

        Logger getLogger(Class<?> key)
        Get a logger
        参数:
        key - the returned logger will be named after clazz
        返回:
        logger

      • getLogger

        Logger getLogger(String key)
        Get a logger
        参数:
        key - the returned logger will be named after key
        返回:
        logger

      • getLevel

        Level getLevel()
        Get the current logging level
        返回:
        current logging level

      • setLevel

        void setLevel(Level level)
        Set the current logging level
        参数:
        level - logging level

      • getFile

        File getFile()
        Get the current logging file
        返回:
        current logging file

      • setFile

        void setFile(File file)
        Set the current logging file
        参数:
        file - logging file
